name: neobank_v1
description: Digital bank with accounts, transactions, and cards
create_sql:
-- Schema: neobank_v1 (Digital bank with accounts, transactions, and cards)

CREATE TABLE customers (
  customer_id INT PK,
  full_name VARCHAR,
  email VARCHAR,
  kyc_status VARCHAR,
  risk_tier VARCHAR,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  country VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE accounts (
  account_id INT PK,
  customer_id INT FK(customers),
  account_type VARCHAR,
  balance DECIMAL(14,2),
  currency VARCHAR,
  status VARCHAR,
  opened_date DATE
);

CREATE TABLE transactions (
  txn_id INT PK,
  from_account INT FK(accounts),
  to_account INT FK(accounts),
  amount DECIMAL(14,2),
  txn_type VARCHAR,
  status VARCHAR,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  reference VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE cards (
  card_id INT PK,
  account_id INT FK(accounts),
  card_type VARCHAR,
  last4 CHAR(4),
  expiry_date DATE,
  status VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE card_transactions (
  card_txn_id INT PK,
  card_id INT FK(cards),
  merchant_name VARCHAR,
  merchant_category VARCHAR,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  currency VARCHAR,
  status VARCHAR,
  txn_at TIMESTAMP
);
